name: Logify
absorption_note: Rust zero-cost structured-logging framework, hexagonal architecture, 1031 LOC. Overlay onto existing PhenoObservability/crates/logkit (scaffold from PR #102, commit 128ca61). Overlay completes the prior scaffold absorption with the canonical Logify implementation. Source repo KooshaPari/Logify archived 2026-07-17.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; structured logging framework. Identity drift 'crate logkit vs repo Logify' resolved by overlay (crate name preserved, repo archived). All Phenotype Rust crates can now consume logkit via the PhenoObservability workspace.
